edges.note: Human sense, priority, approval and abort authority stay outside automation.
Cabinet owns the map semantics during v0.
Only approved Cabinet candidates should become Bureau-operational.
Bureau can hand scoped work to the operator layer.
Codex is suited for review, logic bugs and invariants.
Claude is suited for architecture and heavy conceptual review.
Jules is suited for small clear patches.
Local agents are suited for cheap scans and repetitive checks.
Agent output is a proposal until evidence and review pass.
Agent output is a proposal until evidence and review pass.
Agent output is a proposal until evidence and review pass.
Agent output is a proposal until evidence and review pass.
PRs, branches, issues and reviews remain GitHub-owned state.
Checks and review gates provide hard technical feedback.
RepoBrief is the public context-view name; Lenskit remains an implementation namespace for now.
RepoBrief gives Cabinet citable repository context.
Steuerboard can provide read-only repo-state signals, not decisions.
Vibe-Lab provides method experiments and evidence patterns.
Chronik provides event trace and historical continuity.
Schauwerk may render map views without owning the map canon.
heim-pc is the intended local worktree and operator surface for maintaining v0.
Infra owns cockpit and host runbook concerns.
Infra owns server operation knowledge.
Weltgewebe product work is still validated through repo, PR and CI state.
Device Graph may describe infrastructure devices; it is not the ecosystem-governance map canon.
Cabinet provides map artifacts for Leitstand display.
Leitstand observes the map as orientation, not truth.
Chronik provides event trace artifacts for timelines.
Bureau may provide read-only task status artifacts.
Primary repo state can be reflected.
Primary check state can be reflected.
Plexer delivers bounded operational events to Chronik agent.ledger when configured.
Grabowski may write task-local agent-run events through an explicit Chronik outbox path.
Chronik event presence can support evidence references; Bureau still owns task and verification truth.
Leitstand may display Chronik state without treating the display as authority.
Heimlern may consume historical outcomes offline; no policy is auto-applied.
Gemini may be used only as proposal-only review/scout capacity after capability and sandbox preflight; no push, merge, runtime mutation or private-context authority.
Gemini output is a proposal until Grabowski or human review binds evidence and decides any effect.
